name: Rewriting the Response Path: Silent Tampering and Provider-Signed Defense in BYOK LLM Agents

description: arXiv:2605.02187v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: LLM agents convert model outputs into consequential actions, including communications, code changes, and financial transactions.
